text: the app keeps crashing, but i actually just updated it? is that normal?

I am experiencing an issue with the export to PDF function. It appears to be greyed out on my end, while my colleagues are able to utilize the feature without any problem. I have tried refreshing the page and accessing it from different browsers, but the issue persists. Could you please assist me in resolving this?
I am experiencing issues with the app crashing repeatedly on launch. I have already attempted reinstalling it, but the problem persists.

I have reached out multiple times regarding my recent experience and I am still waiting for a response. It seems as though my concerns are being overlooked, and I am eager to receive some feedback on this matter. Can anyone provide an update on ticket #5678, which I submitted last week?

I have been experiencing significant delays in receiving support for my recent inquiry. It's been over a week since I submitted my ticket, and I haven't heard back from anyone. This is highly unusual compared to my previous interactions, and I would really appreciate an update on the status of my request at your earliest convenience.

I am writing to express my concern regarding the lack of response to my recent ticket #4421. It has been over a week since I reached out, and I have yet to receive any updates. Could you please provide me with an update on my inquiry?

I recently received an order that was not the correct size. I would prefer a full refund rather than store credit, as I need to make a different purchase. Please assist me with the return process and ensure my payment is refunded promptly.
Could you please clarify whether the pro plan is billed on a monthly basis or yearly? I want to ensure I choose the option that best fits my budget.
